# QA Process Change Survey — Item Draft

**Target population:** Programme coordinators at accredited institutions
**Study window:** QA Policy Reform period (2020–2024)

## Section A: Retrospective Practice Items

1. In the past 6 months, how often did your programme revise its
   self-evaluation report format?
   (1 = never, 5 = very often)

2. Since last summer, has your programme changed the way it collects
   student feedback?
   (1 = no change, 5 = major change)

3. How many times in the past year did your programme consult external
   reviewers before the scheduled accreditation visit?
   (open numeric)

## Section B: Perceived Impact Items

4. The QA policy changes over 2020–2024 improved the clarity of my
   programme's accreditation criteria.
   (1 = strongly disagree, 5 = strongly agree)
